nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.grounding_span: I use OpenAI to scan provided text for keywords related to banking and finance and list anything related. Also summarize the key provisions.

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I review the information myself in case there are any obvious hallucinations. I will spot check and confirm anything that appears incomplete.

nodes.label: AI as skill amplifier
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to perceived competence
nodes.grounding_span: My AI assisted reports are always well received by management, and they are impressed with the detailed information. It makes me appear very competent and using my time efficiently.

nodes.label: AI as professional development tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI cannot replace my 35 years of experience. There are things that must be learned over time, and not just fact based.

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: Premature trust in AI for critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I think as I get more familiar with it, I assume I will find more ways to use it to help me. Such as reviewing loan documents for errors. But for now I don't have that level of confidence.

nodes.label: Professional efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It makes me appear very competent and using my time efficiently.

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: I review the information myself in case there are any obvious hallucinations.

nodes.label: Autonomy and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I work very independently so how I perform my role is entirely up to me.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: My AI assisted reports are always well received by management, and they are impressed with the detailed information.

nodes.label: Distrust due to hallucination experience
nodes.grounding_span: I review the information myself in case there are any obvious hallucinations.

nodes.label: Confidence in human irreplaceability in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: AI cannot replace my 35 years of experience.

nodes.label: Cautious optimism for future expanded use
nodes.grounding_span: I think as I get more familiar with it, I assume I will find more ways to use it to help me.

nodes.label: Consistency-driven reuse of prompts
nodes.grounding_span: I provide the same prompt to maintain consistency and get the information back in the correct format.

nodes.label: Hands-on verification and oversight
nodes.grounding_span: I review the information myself in case there are any obvious hallucinations. I will spot check and confirm anything that appears incomplete.
